args.content:
Hawaii Packing List

Based on Emma Johnson's Vacation Itinerary

Destination: Hawaii
Dates: June 10th - June 20th, 2024

Recommended Items to Pack:
  - Swimwear (for beach days at Waikiki Beach and kayaking at Kailua Beach)
  - Sunscreen (essential for outdoor activities)
  - Hiking gear (for Diamond Head hike)
  - Snorkeling equipment (for Hanauma Bay)
  - Casual outfits (for daily wear and the luau experience)
  - Camera (to capture memories)
  - Travel documents (ID, passport, flight tickets, hotel reservations)
  - Beach towels
  - Sunglasses and hats
  - Light jacket (for cooler evenings)
  - Water shoes (for beach and snorkeling)
  - Reusable water bottle
  - Personal medications
  - Phone and charger
  - Travel adapter (if needed)

Special items for planned activities:
  - Swimwear and beach gear for Waikiki Beach (June 11)
  - Snorkeling gear for Hanauma Bay (June 12)
  - Hiking shoes and appropriate clothing for Diamond Head (June 13)
  - Comfortable walking shoes for Pearl Harbor visit (June 14)
  - Casual yet nice attire for the luau at Polynesian Cultural Center (June 16)
  - Spa-appropriate clothing for hotel spa day (June 17)
  - Kayaking gear for Kailua Beach (June 18)
  - Shopping bags/pouches for Ala Moana Center (June 19)
